name: 安德烈·诺瓦
introduction: In 2024 Andrei will be seen playing opposite Jonah Hauer - King in the Tv series 'The Tattoist of Auschwitz' , based on the best selling novel written by Heather Morris.In 2023 he appears in the Marvel/Disney Tv series 'Secret Invasion'.In 2020 he played opposite Italian star Paola Cortellesi on Sky's detective series 'Petra' and appeared in Warner Bros' feature film 'The Beast' opposite Fabrizio Gifuni and alongside Andrea Pennacchi.Other credits include BBC's 'McMafia' (2018), '007: No Time to Die' (2021) and DC's 'The Flash' (2023).
